summary: Comprehensive testing of Wol Dynamics landing page completed. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success). Frontend loads correctly with all sections, navigation, and responsive design. Minor issue with contact form submission reliability.

ui_bugs.issue: Service dropdown selection occasionally fails, causing form validation error 'Por favor completa todos los campos requeridos'
ui_bugs.workaround: Using keyboard navigation (ArrowDown + Enter) works consistently

integration_issues.issue: Form submissions sometimes don't appear immediately in admin panel or form doesn't clear after submission

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections (Hero, Services, Pricing, Portfolio, Testimonials, Contact)
WhatsApp floating button with correct URL (wa.me/5491135921999)
Admin panel loads and displays stats correctly
Mobile responsive design and mobile menu
All pricing plans displayed correctly ($300k Básico, $700k Profesional, Empresa cotización)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix contact form service dropdown selection reliability. The dropdown sometimes fails to register the selected value, causing validation errors. Consider using a more robust dropdown implementation or fixing the current Select component's value binding.
